title: Evil Pumpkins!
description: Adds evil pumpkins to your game
body:
This is a simple mod that adds a silly monster into your game! This monster is none other than.... The EVIL PUMPKIN! They are small and do not have a lot of health, but watch out! There is a boss pumpkin lurking in the darkness...

![Pumpkins!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88df0634e8287e1ae12be258e884578e14a9db6e.png)

FEATURES:

- An Evil pumpkin. About 10 health and little damage

- Multiple variants of the Evil Pumpkin

- A pumpkin boss, does large damage and has a lot more health

- Custom Pumpkins!
